flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Wofford College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($49.5k → $56.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Wofford College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($49.5k → $56.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Wofford College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Wofford College are 65% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($69.0k vs $41.7k).
